TextView.android:text: Spring cherry blossoms in full bloom
Stunning turquoise lake formed by 2010 landslide
Panoramic view of the 7,788 m Rakaposhi peak
Highest point with 360° sunset views of Hunza
Islamabad → Gilgit (PIA flight), Check-in Serena Hotel
Attabad Lake boat ride, Gojal Valley sightseeing
Baltit Fort, Karimabad bazaar, local crafts shopping
Eagle's Nest trek, Rakaposhi base camp hike
Free day / Khunjerab Pass visit, Return flight to ISB
Carry warm layers — nights drop to 2°C even in summer
SCOM SIM recommended — Telenor/Jazz coverage is limited beyond Gilgit
Khunjerab Pass requires NOC from PTDC — book 2 weeks ahead
Cash is king — withdraw PKR in Gilgit city before heading north
